message:
test(search): add 16 proptest serde roundtrips for indexing pipeline types

New proptest file covering PaneWatermark, PipelineState, and
PipelineSkipReason with serde roundtrip, Clone/PartialEq, JSON shape
validation, skip_serializing_if behavior, and wire format unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
